nasb.text: Better is he who is lightly esteemed and has a servant Than he who honors himself and lacks bread.

esv.text: Better to be lowly and have a servant than to play the great man and lack bread.

cnv.text: 被人輕看卻有僕人的人， 勝過自尊自大卻缺少食物的人。

ccb.text: 地位卑微却有仆人， 胜过自高却饿肚子。

csbs.text: 人受蔑视却有自己的奴仆， 好过自尊自大却缺乏粮食。
